title: Why the winner of America’s second-largest Powerball jackpot was forced into the spotlight
summary: A $1.82 billion Powerball jackpot winner was publicly identified as Tracy Hartwick following Arkansas's mandatory six-month confidentiality period. The story has minimal direct relevance to Syracuse city operations but reflects broader public interest in transparency laws and identity disclosure policies.
processing_notes: Article is geographically out-of-scope (Arkansas, not Syracuse)
No Syracuse city departments, services, or operations referenced
Minimal relevance to CIO portfolio unless flagged for privacy/transparency policy benchmarking
Extracted dollar amount ($1.82B) refers to lottery jackpot, not municipal budget or revenue
